description: MCP server for Khipu — Chilean instant bank-transfer payments (complements Transbank cards)
name: io.github.codespar/mcp-khipu

environmentVariables.description: Khipu v3 API key (sent as x-api-key header). Obtain from Khipu merchant panel → Developers.
environmentVariables.name: KHIPU_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Khipu receiver id (merchant id). Required only for legacy v2 HTTP Basic auth; not needed when KHIPU_API_KEY is set.
environmentVariables.name: KHIPU_RECEIVER_ID

environmentVariables.description: Khipu receiver secret. Required only for legacy v2 HTTP Basic auth; not needed when KHIPU_API_KEY is set.
environmentVariables.name: KHIPU_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Khipu API base URL. Defaults to https://payment-api.khipu.com/v3.
environmentVariables.name: KHIPU_BASE_URL
